pricingPage.label: Pricing
pricingPage.title: Simple and transparent
pricingPage.descriptionLine1: Start for free. Upgrade when you're ready.

0.question: Can I change my plan at any time?
0.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. The change takes effect immediately.

1.question: Is there a commitment?
1.answer: No commitment. You can cancel at any time. The free plan remains available with no time limit.

2.question: Is my data secure?
2.answer: Absolutely. Your data is encrypted, isolated by organization, and hosted in Europe. JWT authentication with refresh token.

3.question: Which AI model is used?
3.answer: Claude (Anthropic) by default, with GPT as fallback. You can configure the model of your choice via settings.

4.question: Can I import my existing contacts?
4.answer: Yes, you can import and export your contacts in CSV format from the Contacts page. The import includes intelligent column mapping.

5.question: What automations can I create?
5.answer: You can create automated workflows based on triggers: deal created, stage changed, contact updated, overdue task, etc. Add conditions and automatic actions like sending an email, creating a task, or updating a field.

6.question: Can I connect my email?
6.answer: Yes! Qeylo integrates with Gmail and Outlook via OAuth. Connect your mailbox in one click from settings to centralize your communications.

cgu.label: Legal
cgu.title: Terms of Service
cgu.subtitle: Terms governing access to and use of the Qeylo service.

article1.title: Article 1 – Purpose
article1.p1: These Terms of Service (ToS) govern access to and use of the Qeylo service, an AI-powered conversational CRM, published by Qeylo SASU.
article1.p2: By creating an account on Qeylo, the user unconditionally accepts these ToS.

items.0: "Service": the Qeylo platform accessible at qeylo.com and its applications
items.1: "User": any natural or legal person registered to the Service
items.2: "User Content": all data entered by the User (contacts, deals, tasks, notes, etc.)

items.0: Registration requires a valid email address and a secure password (minimum 8 characters)
items.1: The User is responsible for the confidentiality of their credentials
items.2: Each account is personal and may not be shared
items.3: The User agrees to provide accurate information and keep it up to date

article4.title: Article 4 – Description of the service

plans.0: Solo Plan (free): 1 user, 100 contacts, 1 pipeline, 50 AI messages/month
plans.1: Pro Plan (€19/month): 1 user, unlimited contacts, multi-pipeline, unlimited AI, workflows, segments, advanced reports
plans.2: Team Plan (€49/month): unlimited users, everything in the Pro plan, shared organization, roles & permissions, API access

article4.outro: The detailed features of each plan are described on the Pricing page of the website.

items.0: Use the Service in accordance with its intended purpose and applicable laws
items.1: Not use the Service for illegal, fraudulent purposes or infringing the rights of third parties
items.2: Not attempt unauthorized access to Qeylo's systems
items.3: Not perform scraping, automated extraction, or reverse engineering of the Service
items.4: Not store illegal content via the Service

article6.title: Article 6 – Intellectual property
article6.p1: The Service, its source code, design, trademarks, and logos are the exclusive property of Qeylo SASU.
article6.p2: The User retains full rights over their User Content.
article6.p3: The User grants Qeylo a limited license to use their User Content solely for the purpose of providing the Service.

article7.title: Article 7 – Personal data
article7.p1: The processing of personal data is described in our Privacy Policy accessible at
article7.p2: By using the Service, the User acknowledges having read this policy.

article8.title: Article 8 – Availability and maintenance
article8.p1: Qeylo commits to using its best efforts to ensure the availability of the Service 24/7.
article8.p2: Temporary interruptions may occur for maintenance, updates, or in case of force majeure.
article8.p3: Qeylo will endeavor to notify users in advance of planned maintenance.

items.0: Qeylo is bound by an obligation of means in providing the Service
items.1: Qeylo shall not be held liable for indirect damages (data loss, loss of revenue, lost profits)
items.2: Qeylo's total liability is limited to the amounts paid by the User over the last 12 months
items.3: Qeylo shall not be held liable in case of force majeure

items.0: The User may terminate their account at any time from their account settings
items.1: Qeylo reserves the right to suspend or terminate an account in case of violation of these ToS, after notification
items.2: Upon termination, User data is retained for 30 days, then deleted in accordance with our privacy policy

article11.title: Article 11 – Modification of ToS
article11.p1: Qeylo reserves the right to modify these ToS at any time.
article11.p2: Users will be notified by email of any substantial change at least 30 days before it takes effect.
article11.p3: Continued use of the Service after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the new ToS.

article12.title: Article 12 – Applicable law and disputes
article12.p1: These ToS are governed by French law.
article12.p2: In case of dispute, the parties agree to seek an amicable solution.
article12.p3: Failing an amicable agreement, jurisdiction is attributed to the Commercial Court of Avignon.

article13.title: Article 13 – Contact
article13.text: For any question regarding these ToS:
